SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. TOM LAM INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, TIN PANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, GWEN Z. DBA  CHINESE CENTER EMPLOYMENT AGENCY $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED FOR THE 2ND TIME.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
